4.definition: To depart; to go to another place.
An abstract archetype of a given thing, compared to which real-life examples are seen as imperfect approximations; pure essence, as opposed to actual examples.
A toy in the form of a human.
An area of level ground.
(stative) To perceive sounds through the ear.
Action given to provide assistance; aid.
The act of jumping; a leap; a spring; a bound.
A drawing showing technical details of a building, machine, etc., with unwanted details omitted, and often using symbols rather than detailed drawing to represent doors, valves, etc.
The left side of a horse or of a team of horses pulling a carriage etc.
The common minnow, Phoxinus phoxinus.
An emotional or psychological humiliation or bad experience.
(obsolete outside dialectal) An assize.
A (usually marked) place where buses, trams or trains halt to let passengers get on and off, usually smaller than a station.
An elevated location smaller than a mountain.
(heading, physical) To do with shape.
The supreme effort one can make, or has made.
A short symbol, often with little relation to the item it represents.
Activity for amusement only, especially among the young.
Something being indicated that is there; one of those.
To lament.
A musical composition with lyrics for voice or voices, performed by singing.
To put (something) in a place where it will be harder to discover or out of sight.
Large, great.
To make glad
Anything that is found (usually valuable), as objects on an archeological site or a person with talent.
A regulation, law, guideline.

A reflexive, often habitual behavior, especially one occurring in a context that often features attempts at deception by persons under psychological stress (such as a poker game or police interrogation), that reveals information that the person exhibiting the behavior is attempting to withhold.
A round or irregular patch on the surface of a thing having a different color, texture etc. and generally round in shape.
A large settlement, bigger than a town; sometimes with a specific legal definition, depending on the place.
A train that calls at only some stations it passes between its origin and destination, typically just the principal stations
Factually right, correct; factual.
A path through two or more points (compare ‘segment’); a continuous mark, including as made by a pen; any path, curved or straight.
A strong wind.
Fast growing function based on Kruskal's tree theorem.
The meat from a cow, bull or other bovine.
A lazy person.
Anything that is hollow and cylindrical in shape.
A solid or hollow sphere, or roughly spherical mass.
An instance of riding.
Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.
A journey; an excursion or jaunt
(with "the") Those who have little or no possessions or money, taken as a group.
A police officer.
In various sports, a block that prevents an opponent from scoring.
A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.
A time period of sixty minutes; one twenty-fourth of a day.
The act of killing.
The time at which something happens.
Something being indicated that is there; one of those.
Any nounal word or phrase which indicates a particular person, place, class, or thing.
One of the four principal compass points, specifically 90°, conventionally directed to the right on maps; the direction of the rising sun at an equinox. Abbreviated as E.
A large omnivorous mammal, related to the dog and raccoon, having shaggy hair, a very small tail, and flat feet; a member of family Ursidae.
Physically secure and certain, non-failing, reliable.
A division, a portion, a share.
A ball that passes so far from the batsman that the umpire deems it unplayable; the arm signal used by an umpire to signal a wide; the extra run added to the batting side's score
The bottom of a face, (specifically) the typically jutting jawline below the mouth.
(with "the", a demonstrative, or a possessive) Those who have died.
An amusing story.
A fertilized and ripened ovule, containing an embryonic plant.
The result of a contest that neither side has won; a tie.
Free transfer
A long walk.
A small, usually round or cylindrical object designed for easy swallowing, usually containing some sort of medication.
The front part of the head of a human or other animal, featuring the eyes, nose and mouth, and the surrounding area.
(money) A subunit of currency equal to one-hundredth of the main unit of currency in many countries. Symbol: ¢.
A going; journey; travel; voyage; course; passage.
The kola plant, genus Cola, famous for its nut, or one of these nuts.
To utilize or employ.
The part of Earth which is not covered by oceans or other bodies of water.
(sometimes in the plural) The remains of a destroyed or dilapidated construction, such as a house or castle.
An edible fruit produced by the pear tree, similar to an apple but elongated towards the stem.
A mental or emotional state, composure.
Final, ultimate, coming after all others of its kind.
To pay (a debt, fine etc.).
Something actual as opposed to invented.
A payment made by a tenant at intervals in order to occupy a property.
A high point or position, literally or figuratively; an elevated place; a superior region; a height; the sky; heaven.
A ball that passes so far from the batsman that the umpire deems it unplayable; the arm signal used by an umpire to signal a wide; the extra run added to the batting side's score
A passenger vehicle for public use that runs on tracks in the road (called a streetcar or trolley in North America).
(money) A piece of currency, usually metallic and in the shape of a disc, but sometimes polygonal, or with a hole in the middle.
Any of several stiff plants of the genus Juncus, or the family Juncaceae, having hollow or pithy stems and small flowers, and often growing in marshes or near water.
A long dowel or plank protruding from the ground; a fencepost; a lightpost.
A woody plant distinguished from a tree by its multiple stems and lower height, being usually less than six metres tall; a horticultural rather than strictly botanical category.
A long vowel.
A burrow.
One of the four principal compass points, specifically 270°, conventionally directed to the left on maps; the direction of the setting sun at an equinox, abbreviated as W.
To cause to grow old; to impart the characteristics of age to.
The part of the forelimb below the forearm or wrist in a human, and the corresponding part in many other animals.
The undomesticated state of a wild animal
The rear of the body, especially the part between the neck and the end of the spine and opposite the chest and belly.
An odd, puzzling or absurd person or thing.
The greatest amount.
To incur a charge of; to require payment of a (specified) price.
The act of cooking food by baking.
Physical injury; hurt; damage
An area of land set aside for environment preservation or recreation.
(used in street names) A road, street, or similar thoroughfare.
The act or result of rolling, or state of being rolled.
The external covering at the top of a building.
A mass of things heaped together; a heap.
Food given to (especially herbivorous) animals.
Resistance of the air (or some other fluid) to something moving through it.
A place where waste or garbage is left; a ground or place for dumping ashes, refuse, etc.; a disposal site.
A semiprecious stone, either nephrite or jadeite, generally green or white in color, often used for carving figurines.

A traditional story which embodies a belief regarding some fact or phenomenon of experience, and in which often the forces of nature and of the soul are personified; a sacred narrative regarding a god, a hero, the origin of the world or of a people, etc.
A challenge to prove courage.
The left side of a horse or of a team of horses pulling a carriage etc.
A cold-blooded vertebrate animal that lives in water, moving with the help of fins and breathing with gills.
Strong of its kind or in character; unmitigated; virulent; thorough; utter (used of negative things).
A fruit or vegetable which has ripened.
A tool used for digging; a pickaxe.
A place, as in clothing, which has been repaired by mending.
(sometimes in the plural) The remains of a destroyed or dilapidated construction, such as a house or castle.
An area of level ground.
Meanings relating to a wind instrument.
An injured, infected, inflamed or diseased patch of skin.
A stroke; a blow.
A hole drilled or milled through something, or (by extension) its diameter.
An amusing story.
Someone who is slow; a sluggard.
An act of folding.

A contest between people, animals, vehicles, etc. where the goal is to be the first to reach some objective. Example: Several horses run in a horse race, and the first one to reach the finishing post wins
A body of standing water, such as a lake or a pond. More specifically, it can refer to a lake that is broad in relation to its depth. Also included in place names such as Windermere.
An object of hatred.
A division, a portion, a share.
Grief, sorrow.

Evidence of a long-term debt, by which the bond issuer (the borrower) is obliged to pay interest when due, and repay the principal at maturity, as specified on the face of the bond certificate. The rights of the holder are specified in the bond indenture, which contains the legal terms and conditions under which the bond was issued. Bonds are available in two forms: registered bonds, and bearer bonds.
A graduated, circular scale over which a needle moves to show a measurement (such as speed).
Molten material, the product of melting.
A common, inexpensive metal, silvery grey when untarnished, that rusts, is attracted by magnets, and is used in making steel.
Thermal energy.
One of the male (masculine) sex or gender.
A heavy shoe that covers part of the leg.
One who, or that which, is pure.
A wing of a building, notably in a church separated from the nave proper by piers.
A black rock formed from prehistoric plant remains, composed largely of carbon and burned as a fuel.
A bad habit.
One of two usually roughly equal parts into which anything may be divided, or considered as divided.
A permit to enter and leave a country, normally issued by the authorities of the country to be visited.
A thin, slippery mix of clay and water.
The way in which something hangs.
To a greater degree or extent.
Overly proud of oneself, especially concerning appearance; having a high opinion of one's own accomplishments with slight reason.
A place on the coast at which ships can shelter, or dock to load and unload cargo or passengers.
A person without religious affiliation.
A warden; a guard; a guardian or watchman.

A heavy, pliable, inelastic metal element, having a bright, bluish color, but easily tarnished; both malleable and ductile, though with little tenacity. It is easily fusible, forms alloys with other metals, and is an ingredient of solder and type metal. Atomic number 82, symbol Pb (from Latin plumbum).
An act of going out or going away, or leaving; a departure.
To move, or appear to move, physically upwards relative to the ground.
That which one is morally or legally obligated to do.

A (usually) metal fastener consisting of a cylindrical body that is threaded, with a larger head on one end. It can be inserted into an unthreaded hole up to the head, with a nut then threaded on the other end; a heavy machine screw.
A quick breaking or cracking sound or the action of producing such a sound.
A fellow, comrade, colleague, partner or someone with whom something is shared, e.g. shipmate, classmate.
A type of shoe with an inflexible, often wooden sole sometimes with an open heel.
A rod bent into a curved shape, typically with one end free and the other end secured to a rope or other attachment.
A formation of minerals, specifically:
Loss or damage incurred through a disaster.
True, real, actual.
Any of the genus Rumex of coarse weedy plants with small green flowers related to buckwheat, especially common dock, and used as potherbs and in folk medicine, especially in curing nettle rash.
Any of various types of tall stiff perennial grass-like plants growing together in groups near water.
That which binds or ties.
A cut of meat, often containing a section of a rib.
A building, often found on a farm, used for storage or keeping animals such as cattle.
The space from the thumb to the end of the little finger when extended; nine inches; an eighth of a fathom.
An imitation, usually of lesser quality.
Any of various marine food fish, of the genus Molva, resembling the cod.
Arranged, regular combat between two private persons, often over a matter of honor.
The use of "damn" as a curse.
A strip of fabric, especially from the edge of a piece of cloth.
A piece of fabric attached to a boat and arranged such that it causes the wind to drive the boat along. The sail may be attached to the boat via a combination of mast, spars and ropes.
A crack, crevice, fissure, or hole which admits water or other fluid, or lets it escape.
The way in which something hangs.
To part, separate or divide.
A burden; a weight to be carried.
The central part of fruit, containing the kernels or seeds.
To run away; to escape.
A sour substance.
A crowd; a throng; a multitude or great number of people.
A gas or vapour/vapor that is strong-smelling or dangerous to inhale.
Free transfer
An opinion, a judgment, a surmise.
To go; walk; proceed.
A repeated action; a doing again, refurbishment, etc.
A curve.
Real or perceived movement of atmospheric air usually caused by convection or differences in air pressure.
A pinniped (Pinnipedia), particularly an earless seal (true seal) or eared seal.
Fragments produced by an impact
Physical injury; hurt; damage
A source of inspiration.
The use of "damn" as a curse.
A journey by ox wagon.
Any plant regarded as unwanted at the place where, and at the time when it is growing.
A blow, especially one given with the open hand, or with something broad and flat.
Any large piece of timber or iron long in proportion to its thickness, and prepared for use.
To make (an animal) tame; to domesticate.
To take hold of, particularly with the hand.
An act of winking (a blinking of only one eye), or a message sent by winking.
An act of stabbing or thrusting with an object.
Joy; happiness great delight, especially from one's own good fortune or from another's misfortune.
A group of three people or things.

5.definition: Later; second (of two); next, following, subsequent
A situation in which the king is directly threatened by an opposing piece.
In company; together.
A perfect standard of beauty, intellect etc., or a standard of excellence to aim at.
Heaven.
At no time; on no occasion; in no circumstance.
Not asleep; conscious.
The basic taste sensation induced by sugar.
A craftsperson who works metal into desired forms using a hammer and other tools, sometimes heating the metal to make it more workable, especially a blacksmith.
A liquid from a plant, especially fruit.
A phase.
The beginning of an activity.
To change place.
Panthera tigris, a large predatory mammal of the cat family, indigenous to Asia.
Heaven.
A legally or socially binding conceptual contract of entitlement to wealth, void of intrinsic value, payable for all debts and taxes, and regulated in supply.
A small, round, smooth-skinned edible fruit, usually purple, red, or green, that grows in bunches on vines of genus Vitis.
(of people) Favoured by luck; fortunate; having good success or good fortune
A hard, calcareous structure present in the mouth of many vertebrate animals, generally used for eating.
A place where items may be accumulated or routinely kept.
A substantial, often approximately cuboid, piece of any substance.
The brother or brother-in-law of one’s parent.
An implement consisting of multiple more or less flexible bristles or other filaments attached to a handle, used for any of various purposes including cleaning, painting, and arranging hair.
A composition, normally in prose, telling a story and intended to be represented by actors impersonating the characters and speaking the dialogue
Television, television show, movie.
The control center of the central nervous system of an animal located in the skull which is responsible for perception, cognition, attention, memory, emotion, and action.
An article of clothing, usually worn by women and girls, that hangs from the waist and covers the lower part of the body.
Elongated portion.
Arrangement, disposition, or sequence.
A book specially designed to keep photographs, stamps, or autographs.
The absence of sound; quietness.
The colour/color perceived in the absence of light, but also when no light is reflected, but rather absorbed.
The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.
A circular device capable of rotating on its axis, facilitating movement or transportation or performing labour in machines.
The colour/color perceived in the absence of light, but also when no light is reflected, but rather absorbed.
Motivation to do or achieve something; ability coupled with ambition.
An item of furniture used to sit on or in, comprising a seat, legs, back, and sometimes arm rests, for use by one person. Compare stool, couch, sofa, settee, loveseat and bench.
A wheeled vehicle, generally drawn by horse power.
Any activity that uses physical exertion or skills competitively under a set of rules that is not based on aesthetics.
Sucrose in the form of small crystals, obtained from sugar cane or sugar beet and used to sweeten food and drink.
To contend in physical conflict, either singly or in war, battle etc.
An implement consisting of multiple more or less flexible bristles or other filaments attached to a handle, used for any of various purposes including cleaning, painting, and arranging hair.
A woolly ruminant of the genus Ovis.
The act of seizing or capturing.
A portable or wearable timepiece.
In a lower place.

A substance (of molecular formula H₂O) found at room temperature and pressure as a clear liquid; it is present naturally as rain, and found in rivers, lakes and seas; its solid form is ice and its gaseous form is steam.
Beginning; start.
A baked Italian dish of a thinly rolled bread dough crust typically topped before baking with tomato sauce, cheese and other ingredients such as meat, vegetables or fruit
A current day or date.
Any disturbed state of the atmosphere, especially as affecting the earth's surface, and strongly implying destructive or unpleasant weather.
Something additional, such as an item above and beyond the ordinary school curriculum, or added to the usual charge on a bill.
The quantity of bread or other baked goods baked at one time.
Having life; living; not dead
Strength or energy of body or mind; active power; vigour; might; capacity of exercising an influence or producing an effect.
One who occupationally works with records, accounts, letters, etc.; an office worker.
An instance of breaking something into two or more pieces.
A fern; bracken.
To lay or place; to put (one thing to another)
A group of people congregated or collected into a close body without order.
A sound, or a sound signal
A slightly curved but almost flat dish from which food is served or eaten.
A necessary commodity, a staple requirement.
The action or an instance of flowing or coming out, an outflow, particularly:
Books and other material created by printing presses, considered collectively or as a medium.
Rushed action.
A specific act committed in violation of the law.
Healthy.
A final examination; a test or examination given at the end of a term or class; the test that concludes a class.
Words or a formula supposed to have magical powers.
The third planet of the Solar System; the world upon which humans live.

(usually uncountable) A form of football in which players can hold or kick an ovoid ball. The ball cannot be handled forwards and points are scored by touching the ball to the ground in the area past their opponent’s territory or kicking the ball between goalposts and over a crossbar.
A summons to arms, as on the approach of an enemy.
Any of various plants of the family Cucurbitaceae grown for food, generally not including the cucumber.
A map.
A thin slice of fried potato eaten as a snack.
To take by the arm; to take up in one's arms.
A royal person; a member of a royal family.
An optical or other representation of a real object; a graphic; a picture.
The edge of the land where it meets an ocean, sea, gulf, bay, or large lake.
True facts, genuine depiction or statements of reality.
Confidence in or reliance on some person or quality.
Something of the smallest possible extent; an indivisible unit.
(usually plural) A container, especially a bottle, whose contents have been used up, leaving it empty.
A series of interconnected rings or links usually made of metal.
The quality (positive or negative) that renders something desirable or valuable.
Beefsteak, a slice of beef, broiled or cut for broiling.
That which is thin and broad.
A colour like that of chocolate or coffee.
The act of standing.
Healthy.
A person who is held in servitude as the property of another person, and whose labor (and often also whose body and life) is subject to the owner's volition and control.
Elongated portion.
One of the four major compass points, specifically 0°, directed toward the North Pole, and conventionally upwards on a map, abbreviated as N.
An act of stamping the foot, paw or hoof.
A mark left by something that has passed along.
The emerging stem and embryonic leaves of a new plant.
Very bad.
To change place.
One of the four major compass points, specifically 180°, directed toward the South Pole, and conventionally downwards on a map, abbreviated as S.
A building for recreational use such as a hunting lodge or a summer cabin.
One of the sensations produced by the tongue in response to certain chemicals; the quality of giving this sensation.
One of the large bodies of water separating the continents.
A button whose functions are pausing and resuming something, such as a DVD player, a video game or a computer.
A wandering; a vagary.
A person who serves as a subject for artwork or fashion, usually in the medium of photography but also for painting or drawing.
All animals or plants of the same species or subspecies.
(grammar) Any of the forms of a verb which distinguish when an action or state of being occurs or exists.
A stimulant, such as amphetamine, that increases energy and decreases appetite.
Having or demonstrating undivided and constant support for someone or something.
A group of similar things, either growing together, or in a cluster or clump, usually fastened together.
A thin bed cloth used as a covering for a mattress or as a layer over the sleeper.
A felt-tipped permanent marker.
So as to form a circle or trace a circular path, or approximation thereof.
A harbour or anchorage protected from the sea.
A tree of the Acer genus, characterised by its usually palmate leaves and winged seeds.
Aromatic or pungent plant matter (usually dried) used to season or flavour food.
A young dog, especially before sexual maturity (12-18 months)
A unit of mass equal to 16 avoirdupois ounces (= 453.592 37 g). Today this value is the most common meaning of "pound" as a unit of weight.
A vertical (or nearly vertical) rock face.
Having resemblance or similitude; similar; without difference.
To contend in physical conflict, either singly or in war, battle etc.
A ship used to transport people, smaller vehicles and goods from one port to another, usually on a regular schedule.
A covering for a window to keep out light. The covering may be made of cloth or of narrow slats that can block light or allow it to pass.
A man who is about to marry.
An interval of space or time in which one set of events or phenomena is completed.
(Also in plural: spoils) Plunder taken from an enemy or victim.
A trembling or shaking.
A period of time before an event occurs; the act of delaying; procrastination; lingering inactivity.
A mythical human of very great size.
To come up from a lower to a higher position.
To be under an obligation to give something back to someone or to perform some action for someone.
A button whose functions are pausing and resuming something, such as a DVD player, a video game or a computer.
To spoil or ruin (one's chance of success)
The act of stealing property.
The act of shaking or being shaken; tremulous or back-and-forth motion.
A buoyant device used to support something in water or another liquid.
An organism that is not an animal, especially an organism capable of photosynthesis. Typically a small or herbaceous organism of this kind, rather than a tree.
A leader or head of a group of people, organisation, etc.
An uncertain duration of time, a period of time.
A summons to arms, as on the approach of an enemy.
To deliberately take hold of; to grab or capture.
The legal department of a company.
Someone who guides, especially someone hired to show people around a place or an institution and offer information and explanation.
Someone who dives, especially as a sport.
To consume (a liquid) through the mouth.
A compartment for a single animal in a stable or cattle shed.
Fate; destiny; luck.
(of a place, situation, person, etc) In a disorderly state; chaotic; disorderly.
The breadth, depth or reach of a subject; a domain.
A carucate.
A place at which one is regularly found; a habitation or hangout.
A trust or confidence in the intentions or abilities of a person, object, or ideal from prior empirical evidence.
(plural "grand") A thousand of some unit of currency, such as dollars or pounds. (Compare G.)
All animals or plants of the same species or subspecies.
A person from the countryside; a rustic.
A sticky, gummy substance secreted by trees; sap.
A rating.
A sudden, heavy impact.
A picture.
A set of principles of right and wrong behaviour guiding, or representative of, a specific culture, society, group, or individual.
Cessation; extinction (see without cease).

An enclosed area, often outdoor, for the presentation of sporting events (sports arena) or other spectacular events; earthen area, often oval, specifically for rodeos (North America) or circular area for bullfights (especially Hispanic America).
A distinctive mark, token, sign, emblem or cognizance, worn on one's clothing, as an insignia of some rank, or of the membership of an organization.
A conduit allowing liquid to flow out of an otherwise contained volume; a plughole (UK)
A quotation; a statement attributed to a person.
An aristocrat; one of aristocratic blood.
A normally regular beat felt when arteries are depressed, caused by the pumping action of the heart.
A long, thin piece of land; any long, thin area.
One who teases.
Any of various medical instruments used to explore wounds, organs, etc.
A lifting of the shoulders to signal indifference or a casual lack of knowledge.
Someone who or something that moves.
One chosen or set apart.
A device that has a helical function.
A textile often made of cotton with a distinct diagonal pattern.
The act of sparing; moderation; restraint.
An evil creature.
An instance of sniffing.
Having a hardness and severity of nature or manner.
The symbol ♯, placed after the name of a note in the key signature or before a note on the staff to indicate that the note is to be played a semitone higher.
A piece of cloth, or other suitable material, sewed or otherwise fixed upon a garment to repair or strengthen it, especially upon an old garment to cover a hole.
To introduce (something) as a reasoned conclusion; to conclude by reasoning or deduction, as from premises or evidence.
Suffering, hardship.
An elongated piece of wood or similar material, typically put to some use, for example as a wand or baton.
Disbelief or uncertainty (about something); a particular instance of such disbelief or uncertainty.
A rich or powerful person; a magnate.
(heading) A pile.
A group of people organized for some common purpose, usually of about ten members.
A tree, Olea europaea, cultivated since ancient times in the Mediterranean for its fruit and the oil obtained from it.
A part of something that has been separated.
That which remains; that which is left after loss or decay; a remaining portion.
A stick with a flame on one end, used chiefly as a light source; a similarly shaped implement with a replaceable supply of flammable material.
A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.
To honor; to hold in high esteem.
Someone who votes.
A tropical Asian fruit tree, Mangifera indica.
A slashing action or motion, particularly:
To entertain or occupy in a pleasant manner; to stir with pleasing emotions.
(sometimes derogatory) A homeless person; a vagabond.

6.definition: A Christian house of worship; a building where Christian religious services take place.
A container made of rigid material, often with a handle, used to carry liquids or small items.
Something done so as to accomplish a purpose.
A group of people who are closely related to one another (by blood, marriage or adoption); kin; for example, a set of parents and their children; an immediate family.
A person who works the land and/or who keeps livestock, especially on a farm.
A dairy product made from curdled or cultured milk.
A piece of clothing worn on the upper body outside a shirt or blouse, often waist length to thigh length.
To make happy or satisfy; to give pleasure to.
At an earlier time.
A soft, fatty foodstuff made by churning the cream of milk (generally cow's milk).
One who drives something, in any sense of the verb to drive.
A person in the business of navigating ships or other vessels
One that plays
To pick; to make the choice of; to select.
An end; the end of anything.
The act of surveying; a general view.
To arrive, come (to a place).
The rear, back-end
One who adjusts, especially for the insurance industry's employment title "loss adjuster" (or "claims adjuster" in the United States).
The guinea fowl (family Numididae).
A group of twelve items.
Covered with or characterised by clouds; overcast.
The inedible parts of a grain-producing plant.
To weaken, as a joint, ligament, or muscle, by sudden and excessive exertion, as by wrenching; to overstrain, or stretch injuriously, but without luxation
A beverage made by infusing the beans of the coffee plant in hot water.
An attractive, lovely person, especially a (professional) beauty.
Any person that leads or directs
A construction or natural feature that spans a divide.
A movie theatre, a movie house
The child of a person's uncle or aunt; a first cousin.
An end; the end of anything.
An abstract entity used to describe quantity.
A colorful, conspicuous structure associated with angiosperms, frequently scented and attracting various insects, and which may or may not be used for sexual reproduction.
Used as plural of person; a body of human beings considered generally or collectively; a group of two or more persons.
The interior or inner part.
Affected by hunger; desiring of food; having a physical need for food.
Association football
A stringed musical instrument, of European origin, usually with a fretted fingerboard and six strings, played with the fingers or a plectrum (guitar pick).
Capable of producing great physical force.
An iteration; a repetition.
An underground railway, especially for mass transit of people in urban areas.
At an earlier time.
A response or reply; something said or done in reaction to a statement or question.
The act of traveling; passage from place to place.
Substance, material.
A banknote with a denomination of 20.
An informal social gathering, usually in a natural outdoor setting, to which the participants bring their own food and drink.
A paintbrush.
A centre, midpoint.
Forgiveness for an offence.
To entertain or occupy in a pleasant manner; to stir with pleasing emotions.
The striking of one body against another; collision.
In a state of sleep; also, broadly, resting.
To modify.
An aboriginal inhabitant of a region colonized by English-speaking people; in particular:
An open-topped box that can be slid in and out of the cabinet that contains it, used for storing clothing or other articles.
Petroleum, a fluid consisting of a mixture of refined petroleum hydrocarbons, primarily consisting of octane, commonly used as a motor fuel.
The natural world; that which consists of all things unaffected by or predating human technology, production, and design. (Compare ecosystem.)
The outer side of a window or door frame; the jamb.
Each of the seven major bodies which move relative to the fixed stars in the night sky—the Moon, Mercury, Venus, the Sun, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn.
At depth, in a deep way.
(manner) In a simple way or state; considered in or by itself; without addition; alone.
To take a long walk for pleasure or exercise.
An attempt to cause damage, injury to, or death of opponent or enemy.
Having greed; consumed by selfish desires.
Exposure to likely harm; peril.
Something that is number two in a series.
(modal) Truly; in fact; actually.
An attempt to find something.
A younger person.
A dark image projected onto a surface where light (or other radiation) is blocked by the shade of an object.
Despite that; however.
A drawing or diagram conveying information.
The quality of being (especially visually) attractive, pleasing, fine or good-looking; comeliness.
A light, gentle wind.
A more-than-adequate amount.
The variation of strong and weak elements (such as duration, accent) of sounds, notably in speech or music, over time; a beat or meter.
(usually in the plural) That which is deserved or merited; a just punishment or reward
(after a negative) As well.
A dense uncultivated tract of trees and undergrowth, larger than woods.
(reflexive pronoun) Me, as direct or indirect object the speaker as the object of a verb or preposition, when the speaker is also the subject.
A writing; a written document.
One who has won or often wins.
The person, place or thing from which something (information, goods, etc.) comes or is acquired.
A kinetic sculpture or decorative arrangement made of items hanging so that they can move independently from each other.
A physical divider intended to block an area from view, or provide shelter from something dangerous.
A colour/color that is a dark blend of red and blue; dark magenta.
At an earlier time.
To bring into existence; (sometimes in particular:)
To have its proper place.
Near the end of a period of time.
To last, continue, endure.
(of liquids) To heat to the point where it begins to turn into a gas.
A drawing or diagram conveying information.

A stage of proficiency or qualification in a course of study, now especially an award bestowed by a university or, in some countries, a college, as a certification of academic achievement. (In the United States, can include secondary schools.)
The interior or inner part.
In a wide manner; across a wide area.
Forcefully, vigorously.
Sufficiently.
One who or that which kills.
To obtain or receive (something) from something else.
Injury or harm; the condition or measure of something not being intact.
A person who creates art.
(furniture) Following or imitating a style popular during the First French Empire (1804–1814).
One of a set of choices that can be made.
A program that provides services to other programs or devices, either in the same computer or over a computer network.
A choric song of celebration or revel, especially in Ancient Greece.
A portion of some limited resource allocated to a person or group.
A brief or cursory look.
To make happy or satisfy; to give pleasure to.

A round vessel or cask, of greater length than breadth, and bulging in the middle, made of staves bound with hoops, and having flat ends or heads. Sometimes applied to a similar cylindrical container made of metal, usually called a drum.
To deliberately not listen or pay attention to.
(plural media or mediums) The chemistry of the surrounding environment, e.g. solid, liquid, gas, vacuum, or a specific substance such as a solvent.
In a safe manner; without risk; using caution above all else.
(degree) By a small margin.
A more-than-adequate amount.
A change of direction of motion after hitting the ground or an obstacle.
An amount of money returned.
A legume resembling a nut, the fruit of the plant Arachis hypogaea.
Each of the four divisions of a year: spring, summer, autumn (fall) and winter
A description of an event or system that is considered to be accurate.
Any craft designed for transportation on water, such as a ship or boat.
A religious clergyman (clergywoman, clergyperson) who is trained to perform services or sacrifices at a church or temple
An atomic operation.
A textile fabric having a diamond-shaped pattern formed by alternating directions of thread.
A slender jointed extremity of the human hand, exclusive of the thumb.
The act or process of breathing.
A two-handed, single-bladed oar used to propel a canoe or a small boat.
The movement of a vessel from land into the water; especially, the sliding on ways from the stocks on which it is built. (Compare: to splash a ship.)
To give as a gift or donation.
A sticky note, such as a post-it note.
A distinguished or eminent person
To change (something) from a smaller form and/or size to a larger one; to spread out or lay open.
A tendency to be in a certain type of mood; a habitual way of thinking, behaving or reacting.
A peak; the topmost point or surface, as of a mountain.
A worker who is only working for a company occasionally, not as its permanent employee.
To conclude or resolve (something):
To choose one or more elements of a set, especially a set of options.
A device which separates a suspended, dissolved, or particulate matter from a fluid, solution, or other substance; any device that separates one substance from another.
The pungent aromatic rhizome of a tropical Asian herb, Zingiber officinale, used as a spice and as a stimulant and acarminative.
A colleague or partner.
The land ruled by a count or a countess.
A place where people go for recreation, especially one with facilities such as lodgings, entertainment, and a relaxing environment.
A video camera whose output may be viewed in real time over a computer network, especially over the World Wide Web.
A stupid person; a fool.
Forgiveness for an offence.
A device that provides bank customers with cash withdrawal and other services without the need for a human teller.
A higher-pitched or stronger articulation of a particular syllable of a word or phrase in order to distinguish it from the others or to emphasize it.
Mental acceptance of a claim as true.
An act of pointing out or noticing; notice or observation.
As in a dream; resembling a dream.
An efferent blood vessel from the heart, conveying blood away from the heart regardless of oxygenation status; see pulmonary artery.
An actual, real one; notably:

The chemical element (symbol C) with an atomic number of 6. It can be found in pure form for example as graphite, a black, shiny and very soft material, or diamond, a colourless, transparent, crystalline solid and the hardest known material.
A person who trades in ice.
A classical form of dance.
(grammar) A verb, its necessary grammatical arguments, and any adjuncts affecting them.
Offspring resulting from cross-breeding different entities, e.g. two different species or two purebred parent strains.
To deliver into the hands of an enemy by treachery or fraud, in violation of trust; to give up treacherously or faithlessly.
To hurt the feelings of; to displease; to make angry; to insult.
Robbery at sea, a violation of international law; taking a ship away from the control of those who are legally entitled to it.
The deep roar of a large animal, or any similar loud noise.
To cause (something) to move rapidly in opposite directions alternatingly.
A criminal who plunders at sea; commonly attacking merchant vessels, though often pillaging port towns.
A military aircraft designed to carry and drop bombs.
A quiet or unintelligible vocalization; a low tone of voice.
In an open manner, visibly, not covertly.
A small valley between mountains.
An advisement providing more up-to-date information than currently known.
Uncertain
A sport played in a walled court with a soft rubber ball and bats like tennis racquets.
To remove the load or cargo from (a vehicle, etc.).
A formula for preparing or using a medicine; a prescription; also, a medicine prepared from such instructions.
Something produced each hour.
The collective property and liabilities of someone, especially a deceased person.
(usually in the plural) The tip of the toe.
A wise and trusted counselor or teacher
The belief that people of one sex or gender are inherently superior to others.
A cut or notch in the margin of anything, or a recess like a notch.
Action or form of speech deliberately intended to be rude; a particular act or statement having this effect.
To die; in later use especially to die slowly, waste away.
Striving; earnest endeavor; hard work.
A quiet or unintelligible vocalization; a low tone of voice.
(history) Pertaining to the Soviet Union or its constituent republics.
A state of trouble, confusion and turbulence, especially in a political context; a time of riots, demonstrations and protests.
A period of deep thought.
Mode of rule or management.
Moving by creeping along.
A shred of torn cloth; an individual item of torn and ragged clothing.
A set of clothing (with accessories).
To stay or remain in a place or situation, especially as if unwilling to depart or not easily able to do so; to loiter.
Retardation; delay.
One appointed as the substitute of another, and empowered to act for them, in their name or their behalf; a substitute in office
To overwhelm.
A verbal puzzle, mystery, or other problem of an intellectual nature.
A clumsy person.
The act of spreading.
Having or displaying faults; not perfect; not adequate or acceptable.
Not wise; lacking wisdom
An assertion; a section of source code which tests whether an expected condition is true.

7.definition: Enjoying health and vigor of body, mind, or spirit: well.
For the reason (that).
A difficulty that has to be resolved or dealt with.
A trading establishment, especially set up by merchants working in a foreign country.
Vagina
The act of catching fish.
A day on which a festival, religious event, or national celebration is traditionally observed.
Agreement in a design or plan; union formed by mutual communication of opinions and views; accordance in a scheme; harmony; simultaneous action.
A fourth part of something.
Grandfather
An institution which holds books and/or other forms of media for use by the public or qualified people often lending them out, as well as providing various other services for its users.
Something trifling, or of no consequence or importance.
The cardinal number occurring after sixty-nine and before seventy-one, represented in Roman numerals as LXX and in Arabic numerals as 70.
Food waste material of any kind.
Grandmother
The break in the working week, usually two days including the traditional holy or sabbath day. Thus in western countries, Saturday and Sunday.
A representation of anything (as a person, a landscape, a building) upon canvas, paper, or other surface, by drawing, painting, printing, photography, etc.
A humorous drawing, often with a caption, or a strip of such drawings.
The act of greeting someone’s arrival, especially by saying "Welcome!"; reception.
A system of rules and principles for speaking and writing a language.
The short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place, including the temperature, relative humidity, cloud cover, precipitation, wind, etc.
A foreign person, particularly:
The part of something that faces out; the outer surface.
The cardinal number occurring after fourteen (14) and before sixteen (16).
A kind of needle, shorter than a sharp, with a small rounded eye, used for making fine stitches on heavy fabrics.
An airfield (an area designated for the takeoff and landing of aircraft), including one or more runways and (for commercial airports) one or more passenger terminals.
A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.
The current moment or period of time.
A piece of nonfictional writing such as a story, report, opinion piece, or entry in a newspaper, magazine, journal, dictionary, encyclopedia, etc.
The act of cutting of the hair, often done professionally by a barber, hair stylist, or beautician.
An additional one of the same kind.
The time of the day between dusk and night, when it gets dark.
Likely to be affected by or to experience something.
Furnishing help; giving aid; useful.
An inflatable buoyant object, often (but not necessarily) round and flexible.
An accessible structure extending from a building, especially outside a window.
Of a kind likely to be damaging; injurious
To make (something) better; to increase the value or productivity (of something).
A pleasant smell; the scent, odor, or odoriferous particles emitted from a sweet-smelling substance; a pleasant odor
To make a living; earn money for necessities.
A very short period of time; a moment.
A stage performance, show or film that involves singing, dancing and musical numbers performed by the cast as well as acting.
An organ in animals that stores food in the process of digestion.
Suitableness.
(chiefly British) An area of land; a district, region.
An additional name, particularly those derived from a birthplace, quality, or achievement; an epithet.
A glimmering glass-like mineral that is an allotrope of carbon in which each atom is surrounded by four others in the form of a tetrahedron.
To yield, make or manufacture; to generate.
Brushwood for fences and hedges.
Of a person, to continue to live; to remain alive.
In a lucky manner; by good fortune; fortunately.
A set amount of travelling, seen as a single unit; a discrete trip, a voyage.
To fit out with the necessary clothing; to clothe, put clothes on (something or someone).
A speaking or notice of anything, usually in a brief or cursory manner. Used especially in the phrase make mention of.
To deal with a bank or financial institution, or for an institution to provide financial services to a client.
A medical doctor who specializes in dentistry.
By chance; perhaps.
(sometimes attributive) Something which supports.
(manner) In a clear manner.
A branching, hair-like structure that grows on the bodies of birds, used for flight, swimming, protection and display.
In a quiet manner.
A piece of source code or other content that is dynamically retrieved for inclusion in another item.
A current (constantly changing) trend, favored for frivolous rather than practical, logical, or intellectual reasons.
The third season of the year; autumn; fall.
To perform a work or labour; to exert power or strength, physical or mechanical; to act.
A person or animal who receives treatment from a doctor or other medically educated person.
To make happy or satisfy; to give pleasure to.
(with "the") Something certain.
A native inhabitant of a place, country etc.
Sometime; at some unspecified time in the future.
One who travels, especially on a journey to visit sites of religious significance.
A person who is popular, especially at a school.
Comparison.
(long and short scales) The cardinal number 1,000,000: 106; a thousand thousand.
That which is similar to, or resembles, something else, as in quality, form, etc.
A prediction.
To undo the process of knowing, to lose knowledge of something.
Disturbance
The condition of being free from control or restrictions.
A venue where sporting events are held.
In the place of something (usually mentioned earlier); as a substitute or alternative.
Good; in acceptable, if not excellent condition.
Act of requesting (with the adposition at in the presence of possessives, and on in their absence).
To give up or relinquish control of, to surrender or to give oneself over, or to yield to one's emotions.
To put to death; to extinguish the life of.
To occupy fully, to take up all of.
Downward movement, fall.
A forward move; improvement or progression.
A plant of certain species of the genus Brassica, or of related genera (especially Sinapis alba, in the family Brassicaceae, with yellow flowers, and linear seed pods).
To relate (a story or series of events) in speech or writing.
To lead astray, in a false direction.
(except Scotland) (High Sheriff) An official of a shire or county office, responsible for carrying out court orders, law enforcement and other duties.
Someone who watches over something; a person in charge of something or someone.
The male monarch or ruler of an empire.
Disdain, contemptuous feelings, hatred.
A two-wheeled horse-drawn vehicle, used in Bronze Age and Early Iron Age warfare.
Model, example.
To pardon; to waive any negative feeling or desire for punishment, retribution, or compensation.
The calling back of a hawk.
A line marking the boundary of an object figure.
A drawing or picture.
A person's self: general form of himself, herself, themself or yourself.
To instruct or train
(sometimes attributive) Something which supports.
The branch of biology dealing with the relationships of organisms with their environment and with each other.
An objective or aim.
To be entitled to, as a result of past actions; to be worthy to have.
Ambiguous; liable to more than one interpretation.
An act of being of assistance to someone.
A conveyance; a device for carrying or transporting substances, objects or individuals.
Any plant of the genus Nicotiana.
A speaking or notice of anything, usually in a brief or cursory manner. Used especially in the phrase make mention of.
A virtual member function of a class.
Someone who settles in a new location, especially one who takes up residence in a previously uninhabited place; a colonist.
The act, quality, or condition of being honest.
One of the simplest or essential parts or principles of which anything consists, or upon which the constitution or fundamental powers of anything are based.
Anything that is typical, normal, or standard.
A person or animal who receives treatment from a doctor or other medically educated person.
The largest of the apes, native to the forests of central Africa, and known for their trait of knuckle-walking.
A synthetic, solid, hydrocarbon-based polymer, whether thermoplastic or thermosetting.
An area of the earth's surface between two parallels of latitude.
The state of being secluded from the presence, sight, or knowledge of others.
Any of numerous marine plants and algae, such as a kelp.
The greatest or utmost point, degree or condition.
To make (someone) aware of (something impending); especially:
A device measuring the time of day by the position of a shadow cast by a pole or plate (gnomon) upon an engraved series of marks.
A brief look, glance, or peek.
To use up.
Someone who watches over something; a person in charge of something or someone.
A finger-operated lever used to fire a gun.
To be or remain suspended.
That which comes from one's imagination.
In one way or another; in a way not yet known or explained; by some means
To examine critically or carefully; especially, to search out problems or determine condition; to scrutinize.
A thrust; a push; a sudden force that impels.
A person who prepares and sells meat (and sometimes also slaughters the animals).
To end a law, system, institution, custom or practice.
The act of breaking up; disintegration or division.
In an ideal way; perfectly.
Denotes a mingling or intermixing with distinct or separable objects. See usage note at amidst.
An allocated amount.
Not moral; inconsistent with rectitude, purity, or good morals; contrary to conscience or the divine law.
Essential or decisive for determining the outcome or future of something; extremely important.
A convoy or procession of travelers, their vehicles and cargo, and any pack animals, especially camels crossing a desert.
A planned endeavor, usually with a specific goal and accomplished in several steps or stages.
That to which any person or thing is destined; a predetermined state; a condition predestined by the Divine or by human will
Similarly not.
To favor; to render successful.
The act of fluttering; quick and irregular motion.
A fruit of the coconut palm (not a true nut), Cocos nucifera, having a fibrous husk surrounding a large seed.
A formal objection, especially one by a group.
Genuine; meaning what one says or does; heartfelt.
To endeavour to depress the price of, or prices in.
To create a sign out of something.
In a right manner, correctly, justifiably.
A visible, narrow, and intense (relative to ambient light) ray of sunlight.
(often followed by "in"): To yield to a temptation or desire.
A platform that extends outwards from a building.
Having or showing skill; skillful.
A means of escape.
To pass from a higher to a lower place; to move downwards; to come or go down in any way, for example by falling, flowing, walking, climbing etc.
A lodging for pilgrims or the destitute, normally provided by a monastic order.
An annuity paid regularly as benefit due to a retired employee, serviceman etc. in consideration of past services, originally and chiefly by a government but also by various private pension schemes.
(of liquids, such as wine or syrup) To make clear or bright by freeing from feculent matter
Similarly not.
A verbal dispute or heated argument.
To perplex (someone).

Any of a specific group of organic compounds essential in small quantities for healthy human growth, metabolism, development, and body function; found in minute amounts in plant and animal foods or sometimes produced synthetically; deficiencies of specific vitamins produce specific disorders.
To thrust oneself in; to come or enter without invitation, permission, or welcome; to encroach; to trespass.
Without planning or thinking ahead.
The academic staff at schools, colleges, universities or not-for-profit research institutes, as opposed to the students or support staff.
The outermost shape, view, or edge of an object.
To live longer than; continue to live after the death of; overlive; survive.
Showbusiness
The setting, on a portable electronic device, that causes it to vibrate rather than sound any (or most) needed alarms.
The leader of a work crew.
The science of health, its promotion and preservation.
A waterfall or series of small waterfalls.
To put under the surface of a liquid; to dunk.
The top surface of a desk.
Sediment or rock that is not native to its present location or is different from the surrounding material. Sometimes refers to ore or gems.
To state explicitly, or in detail, or as a condition.
To be able to see beforehand: to anticipate; predict.
